matched_lines.original_line: Please quote 10 Utility Knife Spare Blades 10pc

chat_history.text: This is a bit high. Can you give me a 10% discount?

Thank you for getting back to us. I understand where you're coming from — 10.0% would be a bit difficult for us at current pricing. However, I can offer you a 3% discount right away, or if your order value crosses ₹5,000 we can also look at complimentary delivery. Would either of these work for you?
